title: Player-Logs
description: kills certain players when they enter certain areas logs the location of certain players
body:
Features

* kills certain players when they enter certain areas
* logs the location of certain players
 

#Todo

* add more versions (~~1.20~~, 1.18, 1.12, 1.16)
* add reload command
* optimize with events
* PAPI support
* ~~better config~~
* ~~clear log command~~

Commands:
- clearlogs | clears the log file
